parameters.query:
SELECT 
    external_id,
    channel_type,
    username,
    first_name,
    waiting_for_operator,
    agent_disabled,
    agent_disable_type,
    last_activity_at,
    last_message_from,
    created_at,
    channel_id,
    operator_connected,
    connected_operator_name,
    operator_connected_at
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE external_id = '{{ $json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    external_id,
    channel_type,
    username,
    first_name,
    waiting_for_operator,
    agent_disabled,
    agent_disable_type,
    last_activity_at,
    last_message_from,
    created_at,
    operator_connected,
    connected_operator_name,
    COUNT(*) OVER() as total_count
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE agent_disabled = false 
    AND waiting_for_operator = false
    AND last_activity_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
ORDER BY last_activity_at DESC
LIMIT 10 OFFSET {{ ($json.callback_query.data.startsWith('refresh_') ? 0 : parseInt($json.callback_query.data.split('_').pop()) * 10) || 0 }};

UPDATE client_schema.leads 
SET 
    agent_disabled = true,
    agent_disable_type = 'manual',
    waiting_for_operator = false,
    operator_connected = false,
    connected_operator_id = NULL,
    connected_operator_name = NULL,
    operator_connected_at = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE external_id = '{{ $json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}';

SELECT 
    external_id,
    channel_type,
    username,
    first_name,
    waiting_for_operator,
    agent_disabled,
    agent_disable_type,
    last_activity_at,
    last_message_from,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    COUNT(*) OVER() as total_count
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE agent_disable_type = 'manual'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10 OFFSET {{ ($json.callback_query.data.startsWith('refresh_') ? 0 : parseInt($json.callback_query.data.split('_').pop()) * 10) || 0 }};

SELECT 
    external_id,
    first_name,
    username,
    channel_type
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE external_id = '{{ $('Code').first().json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}'
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE client_schema.leads 
SET 
    agent_disabled = false,
    agent_disable_type = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE external_id = '{{ $json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}';

SELECT 
    external_id,
    first_name,
    username,
    channel_type
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE external_id = '{{ $('Code').first().json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    external_id,
    channel_type,
    username,
    first_name,
    waiting_for_operator,
    agent_disabled,
    agent_disable_type,
    last_activity_at,
    last_message_from,
    created_at,
    operator_connected,
    connected_operator_name,
    COUNT(*) OVER() as total_count
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE (waiting_for_operator = true OR operator_connected = true)
ORDER BY last_activity_at ASC
LIMIT 10 OFFSET {{ ($json.callback_query.data.startsWith('refresh_') ? 0 : parseInt($json.callback_query.data.split('_').pop()) * 10) || 0 }};

UPDATE client_schema.leads 
SET 
    operator_connected = true,
    connected_operator_id = {{ $json.operator_data.id }},
    connected_operator_name = '{{ $json.operator_data.username }}',
    operator_connected_at = NOW(),
    waiting_for_operator = false,
    agent_disabled = true,
    agent_disable_type = 'temporary',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE external_id = '{{ $json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}';

UPDATE client_schema.leads 
SET 
    operator_connected = false,
    connected_operator_id = NULL,
    connected_operator_name = NULL,
    operator_connected_at = NULL,
    waiting_for_operator = false,
    agent_disabled = false,
    agent_disable_type = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE external_id = '{{ $json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}';

SELECT 
    external_id,
    channel_type,
    username,
    first_name,
    waiting_for_operator,
    agent_disabled,
    agent_disable_type,
    last_activity_at,
    last_message_from,
    created_at,
    channel_id,
    operator_connected,
    connected_operator_name,
    connected_operator_id,
    operator_connected_at
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE external_id = '{{ $('Code').first().json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    external_id,
    first_name,
    username,
    channel_type
FROM client_schema.leads 
WHERE external_id = '{{ $('Code').first().json.callback_query.data.split("_").pop() }}'
LIMIT 1;
